<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR implements an uncommitted-changes warning system for the post-verify delivery step. It adds platform-level git inspection utilities (`getWorkingTreeStatus`, `hasUncommittedChanges`), exposes them through platform adapters, integrates them into the `recordPostVerify` orchestration function to emit non-blocking warnings when the ticket worktree contains modified or untracked files, and includes test coverage and documentation describing the behavior and configuration changes required.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
<!-- tips_start -->

**Actionable comments posted: 1**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the
rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

Inline comments:
In `@tools/delivery/cli-runner.ts`:
- Around line 948-967: The hasUncommittedChanges/getWorkingTreeStatus calls
currently propagate exceptions and can fail recordPostVerify; wrap the calls to
dependencies.hasUncommittedChanges(target.worktreePath) and
dependencies.getWorkingTreeStatus(target.worktreePath) in try/catch so
inspection is best-effort: if hasUncommittedChanges throws, treat it as false
(or skip warning) and if getWorkingTreeStatus throws, treat statusOutput as
empty and append a short warning that worktree inspection failed; ensure you
still call dependencies.warn(...) only with safe strings and do not rethrow so
post-verify remains non-blocking (references: hasUncommittedChanges,
getWorkingTreeStatus, dependencies.warn, target.worktreePath, recordPostVerify).
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>🪄 Autofix (Beta)</summary>
